## Listing

Product name:

Listing file path:

```txt
data/listings/{company-slug}/{product-slug}.json
```

## Validation

- [ ] I ran `pnpm validate:listings`
- [ ] The listing JSON passed validation

## Confirmation

- [ ] This PR adds or updates exactly one trial listing
- [ ] The listing includes only public product and trial metadata
- [ ] The listing does not include API keys, secrets, private credentials, private customer data, prompts, tracking pixels, or internal docs
- [ ] The listing does not claim partnership, verification, endorsement, or official status unless publicly verifiable
